Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

Is there a test for this?

Patch Set 1:

I didn't add a test to suits. But it is simple reproducible:
 [root@dhcppc3 tests]# lctl get_param osp.lustre-OST0000*.max_create_count
 osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.max_create_count=20000
 [root@dhcppc3 tests]# lctl get_param osp.lustre-OST0000*.create_count
 osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.create_count=32
 [root@dhcppc3 tests]# lctl set_param osp.lustre-OST0000*.max_create_count=0
 osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.max_create_count=0
 [root@dhcppc3 tests]# lctl set_param osp.lustre-OST0000*.max_create_count=20000
 osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.max_create_count=20000
 [root@dhcppc3 tests]# lctl get_param osp.lustre-OST0000*.create_count
 osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.create_count=0

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

> I didn't add a test to suits. But it is simple reproducible:

Can you please put this into a sanity test.  I was just looking to see what a suitable test number was, and see that "cleaup_65k()" is a typo and should be "cleanup_65k()", and that should also be used at the end of the test instead of duplicating the code.

Also, sanity test_311() sets these values but doesn't reset properly if there is an error() in the middle.

Maybe just a small change to test_311() to set only max_create_count and verify that create_count is also reset (with an MDS version check to ensure it is working, otherwise do it manually for old MDS versions):

        for idx in $(seq $MDSCOUNT); do
                local facet=mds$idx
                local create

                do_facet $facet "lctl set_param -n \
                        osp.*OST0000*MDT000?.max_create_count=$max_count"
                [ $(lustre_version_code $facet) -lt $(version_code 2.11.56) ] &&
                        do_facet $facet "lctl set_param -n \
                                osp.*OST0000*MDT000?.create_count=$count"
                (( $(do_facet $facet "lctl get_param -n \
                     osp.*OST0000*MDT000?.create_count) > 0) ||
                        error "$facet create_count is zero"
        done
Uploaded patch set 2.

commit.subject: LU-11605 osp: max_create_count and create_count changes
commit.message:
LU-11605 osp: max_create_count and create_count changes

Setting max_create_count to 0 causes setting create_count
to 0. Set create_count to OST_MIN_PRECREATE when setting
back max_create_count.
Without the patch create_count remains equal to 0 despite
on changing max_create_count to something != 0.
This causes create to stuck in osp_precreate_reserve
because osp_precreate_send doesn't send new request to OST.
To understand the number of objects to precreate(grow) it
uses opd_pre_create_count that is equal to 0.
